description_long: This is a small, arched wooden pedestrian bridge with a gently curved deck and sturdy side railings. The bridge is constructed from dark-stained timber planks, giving it a rustic and natural appearance suitable for parks or garden settings. The railings consist of thick vertical posts and two horizontal rails, with the upper rail following the arch of the bridge. The deck is made of wide, flat wooden boards, and the structure appears robust enough to support foot traffic. The bridge lacks any visible decorative elements, focusing on functional simplicity. There are no integrated lighting fixtures or additional features beyond the essential structure.
description: A small, arched wooden pedestrian bridge with sturdy timber railings and a rustic, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat entry platform, wide wooden deck, and the start of the arched railings.
description_view_1: Top-down angled view highlighting the full arch of the bridge and the symmetrical arrangement of the railings.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the exit platform and the continuation of the wooden deck.
description_view_3: Top-down angled view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the arch and the parallel railings.
attribute_railing_design: wooden posts with two horizontal curved wooden rails
